name: 天然黄水晶聚宝盆
description: 黄水晶是财富与成功的象征，聚宝盆造型更能聚集财气。适合财库空亡、财运不济的命格，补土金二气，招财纳福。
description_en: Citrine is a symbol of wealth and prosperity. The treasure bowl shape amplifies its wealth-attracting energy. Ideal for those with depleted wealth chambers or poor financial fortune — it supplements Earth and Metal energy to attract fortune and blessings.
short_pitch: 为财库空亡命格专属调配
short_pitch_en: Specially formulated for depleted wealth chambers
usage_en: Place on your desk or in the wealth corner of your home (diagonal from the entrance). Wipe gently with clean water weekly. During meditation, hold the crystal and visualize golden light filling your body.
precautions_en:
1. Avoid prolonged direct sunlight to prevent fading
2. Not recommended for bedroom nightstand
3. Remove during exercise and bathing
4. Purify under moonlight for 4 hours after purchase
efficacy_en: Made from 天然黄水晶. Enhances wealth attraction and financial prosperity.

specifications_en.Packaging: 锦盒+鉴定证书+开光证明

2. Keep away from flammable materials

name: 喜马拉雅水晶盐灯
description: 亿万年的岩盐结晶，通电后散发温暖橙红光，土火能量交融。净化空气的同时稳固家居能量场，适合土星刑克、家居能量紊乱者。
description_en: Crystallized from ancient rock salt, emitting warm orange-red light when lit — a fusion of Earth and Fire energy. Purifies air while stabilizing household energy fields. Ideal for those with Saturn squares or chaotic home energy.
short_pitch_en: Warm purifying energy lighthouse
usage_en: Place on your desk or in the wealth corner of your home (diagonal from the entrance). Wipe gently with clean water weekly. During meditation, hold the crystal and visualize golden light filling your body.
precautions_en:
1. Avoid prolonged direct sunlight to prevent fading
2. Not recommended for bedroom nightstand
3. Remove during exercise and bathing
4. Purify under moonlight for 4 hours after purchase
efficacy_en: Made from 喜马拉雅水晶盐. Promotes physical and mental well-being.

name_en: Singing Bowl Sound Healing Set (7 Chakras)

description_en: Silky-smooth mulberry silk lined with Five Element herbal sachet (Mugwort, Lavender, Albizia Flower, Biota Seed, Amber Powder). Ideal for those with severe anxiety, inner drain, or poor sleep quality — wear nightly for restorative rest.

description_en: Hand-embroidered by traditional master craftswomen, filled with natural fragrances and Five Emperor Coins. Carry daily to accumulate wealth energy, enhance relationships, and ward off evil — perfect for those needing financial boost or interpersonal harmony.

Perfect for those with unclear destiny lines, career exploration phases, or seeking professional advancement. name: 雷击枣木令牌（化官非）
name_en: Thunder-Struck Jujube Wood Command Token (Legal Resolution)
description: 雷击枣木为道教至阳法木，经天雷击打后木纹焦黑带金丝，蕴含雷霆正气。令牌正面刻「敕令化讼」，背面刻「冤家解散」。适合官司缠身、合同纠纷、口舌是非不断者，化官非解讼事，以雷霆之力破除阴霾。
description_en: Thunder-Struck Jujube Wood is Taoism's supreme Yang ritual wood — after being struck by celestial lightning, its grain turns charcoal-black with golden threads, containing thunder's righteous energy. The token bears 'Imperial Decree: Resolve Litigation' on front and 'Enemies Disbanded' on back. Perfect for legal disputes, contract conflicts, or persistent gossip — dissolves legal troubles and shatters darkness with thunder's power.
short_pitch_en: Thunder's righteous power resolves legal disputes
usage_en: Place in the appropriate feng shui position according to your needs. Keep clean and treat with respect. Avoid placing in bathrooms or bedrooms.

description: 绿檀木遇光渐变翠绿，天然木香清雅持久。梳齿圆润打磨，每日梳头百下按摩头部经络。绿檀木性温润，木气通肝。适合掌色偏黄(肝胆关注)、气血不足、皮肤暗沉、用脑过度者，晨起睡前梳头，养颜又安神。
description_en: Green Sandalwood gradually turns emerald green in light, with a lasting, elegant natural fragrance. Smoothly rounded teeth massage head meridians with each stroke. Its warm Wood energy connects to the Liver. Ideal for those with yellowish palms (liver concerns), blood Qi deficiency, dull skin, or mental overexertion — comb morning and night for beauty and calm.

description_en: A brass-cast Seven-Star Sword with seven coins embedded along the blade in the Big Dipper constellation pattern, scabbard inscribed with Bagua symbols. A supreme Feng Shui treasure for home protection — hang in the living room when moving in to neutralize sha and invite auspicious energy. Dispels annual afflicted stars like Five Yellow and Two Black. Perfect for recent movers, office relocations, or homes needing Feng Shui adjustment.

description: 寿山石温润凝结，朱红艾叶绿冻石雕刻蝠纹寿字。印纽为仙鹤衔灵芝，寓意延年益寿。适合正印偏印为用需补长辈缘者、父母健康需关注者、孝亲敬老之礼。可作为书房印章实用，亦为客厅福寿摆件。

Seal knob features a crane holding Lingzhi mushroom, symbolizing long life and blessings. Ideal for those needing to strengthen Direct/Indirect Resource stars or elder connections, those with parental health concerns, or as a filial gift. Functional as a study seal and a prosperity display for the living room.
